question: For the quarterly platform engagement distribution, which statement is a valid conclusion from the 100% stacked bar chart?

options.A: Q2 has the highest number of support tickets compared to the other quarters.
options.B: Support tickets account for the largest share of total engagement in Q4.
options.C: The combined height of all metrics shows that overall platform activity is highest in Q3.
options.D: Because each bar reaches 100%, all metrics must have the same absolute values across quarters.

explanation: 100% stacking normalizes unrelated categories to 100% within each quarter. Valid inferences include within-quarter ranking (e.g., one metric > another in every quarter). Invalid inferences include cross-quarter total comparisons or combining unrelated categories.
